texto: The Lord is much like the air around us. The air is all around us, it is everywhere. Even though we can't see it, it is there, we know it is there, because we are breathing. The Lord is everywhere too, you can't see Him, but He is there, we know He is there, because we are breathing. (Page 183)
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Raymond D. Reifinger III: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a fe. O trecho “The Lord is much like the air around us. The air is all around us, it is everywhere. Even though …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que fe, abortion, religion pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de religion e roman-catholic.
